properties.entry: DELETE FROM BQMembershipChange WHERE BQMembershipChange.individualSegmentId IN (:individualSegmentIds)
UPDATE BQMembershipChange SET individualDeleted = :individualDeleted WHERE BQMembershipChange.individualId = :individualId
UPDATE BQMembershipChange SET individualDeleted = :individualDeleted WHERE BQMembershipChange.individualId IN (:individualIds)
UPDATE BQMembershipChange SET individualName = :individualName WHERE BQMembershipChange.individualId = :individualId
